mapper.select: SELECT mbr_prfl_idx AS idx, mbr_prfl_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx, nick_nm, intro, prfl_img_url, memo, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_mbr_prfl WHERE mbr_prfl_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
SELECT mbr_prfl_idx AS idx, mbr_prfl_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx, nick_nm, intro, prfl_img_url, memo, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_mbr_prfl WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mbr_prfl SET nick_nm = #{nickNm}, intro = #{intro}, prfl_img_url = #{prflImgUrl}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_prfl_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
UPDATE tb_mbr_prfl SET memo = #{memo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mbr_prfl ( mbr_acct_idx, nick_nm, intro, prfl_img_url, created_by ) VALUES ( #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{nickNm}, #{intro}, #{prflImgUrl}, #{createdBy} )
